steps.t: Erebor is in the northern end of the Dale-lands. You should travel to Erebor to speak with the dwarves there.
Víglund and the crowd stand before the gates of Erebor, in the northern end of the Dale-lands. You should talk to Víglund about the dwarves gathered a…
You should examine the axe embedded in the statue at the gates of Erebor.
You should examine the rust spot found at the gates of Erebor.
Víglund the guard can be found at the gates of Erebor. You should tell Víglund your conclusion about the axe.
You should continue assisting the Dwarves of Erebor. <rgb=#FF0000>The Trail of Rust quest arc will continue after completing the Under The Mount…
You should speak with Víglund, the guard at the gates of Erebor.
You should speak with Lore-masters Rúni, Spall, Fróthi, Mágsal, and Belgur in Erebor.
Górsim can be found in Erebor. You should speak with Górsim about viewing the teeth of the dragon Scatha.
